name: ingest-facebook-nightly
_fix_notes: 1. Split from combined Meta workflow — Facebook and Instagram have different endpoints, metric names, and scopes
3. Column renamed to access_token — add decryption Code node if truly encrypted at rest
5. Correct Facebook metric names: page_impressions, page_impressions_unique (reach), page_engaged_users
6. Auth moved to Authorization Bearer header
7. Init - Channel State node preserves channel_id/platform after HTTP call
8. IF node gates on absence of error before Transform
9. platform field included in DB upsert
10. ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE replaces plain INSERT
11. Failure path logs separately; success log only fires on verified success

parameters.query: SELECT id AS channel_id, account_id, access_token FROM channels WHERE platform = 'facebook' AND connected_status = 'connected';

INSERT INTO post_metrics (
  channel_id, platform, metric_date,
  reach, impressions, engagements, clicks,
  likes, comments, shares, saves,
  video_views, watch_time_seconds, profile_visits, follower_count,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.channel_id }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', '{{ $json.metric_date }}',
  {{ $json.reach }}, {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.engagements }}, {{ $json.clicks }},
  {{ $json.likes }}, {{ $json.comments }}, {{ $json.shares }}, {{ $json.saves }},
  {{ $json.video_views }}, {{ $json.watch_time_seconds }}, {{ $json.profile_visits }}, {{ $json.follower_count }},
  '{{ $json.created_at }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (channel_id, metric_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  reach           = EXCLUDED.reach,
  impressions     = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  engagements     = EXCLUDED.engagements,
  profile_visits  = EXCLUDED.profile_visits,
  created_at      = EXCLUDED.created_at;

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at)
VALUES ('workflow_execution', 'ingestion', 'n8n', 'system', 'success',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "ingest-facebook-nightly", metrics_count: $input.all().length }) }}',
  now());

INSERT INTO action_log (action_type, resource_type, actor, actor_type, status, details, created_at)
VALUES ('workflow_execution', 'ingestion', 'n8n', 'system', 'failure',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: "ingest-facebook-nightly", error: $json.error }) }}',
  now());
